questions.question: This timeless hymn was written by a former slave ship captain.
questions.host_context: Written by John Newton. Sung at the fall of the Berlin wall.

questions.question: The author of this hymn was inspired to write it while his ship was passing over the place where his daughters parished.
questions.answer: What is "It Is Well with My Soul?"
questions.host_context: Also known as "When Peace, Like A River." Written by Horatio Spafford and composed by Philip Bliss.

questions.question: This hymn, traditionally sung as a Christmas carol, was written by Isaac Watts.
